---
name: Docs or onboarding improvement
about: Suggest documentation, setup, or contributor onboarding improvements
title: "[docs]: "
---

## Gap

What is confusing, missing, or incorrect?

## Where Contributors Get Stuck

Call out the command, file, workflow, or step that caused trouble.

## Suggested Improvement

What change would make the experience clearer?

## Affected Area

- README
- CONTRIBUTING
- examples
- test fixtures
- CLI usage
- GitHub workflow docs
- onboarding guidance

## Additional Context

If possible, include the exact command, error, or screenshot that would help maintainers fix the issue quickly.
